arts.ttl: Barcelona possible lineup against Athletic Club today in the Spanish Super Cup
arts.sum: Hansi Flick hinted at his side for the Spanish Super Cup semi-final against Athletic with the minutes he gave out in the Copa del Rey match against Barbastro, where players like Gavi, Cubarsí, Raphinha and Casadó were rested, as well as Lamine Yamal. In attack, Flick has a Lewandowski who scored again against Barbastro and has back Lamine Yamal and Raphinha, who also did not travel for the Copa del Rey and are well rested.

arts.ttl: Juventus want to close deal for Barcelona star ‘before next week’
arts.sum: The brass at Serie A heavyweights Juventus are ready to push their pursuit of Barcelona star Ronald Araújo into overdrive over the days ahead. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing…

arts.ttl: Arsenal have advantage over Juventus in race to sign Barcelona defender
arts.sum: This week, there has been a lot of speculation linking Ronald Araujo with a Barcelona exit, and these links are now being added to. Juventus are very interested in signing the Uruguayan defender, who made his first start of the season last weekend, although they are not the only ones. As per MD, Arsenal are […] The post Arsenal have advantage over Juventus in race to sign Barcelona defender appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star could join Vitor Roque at Real Betis in January
arts.sum: A 2nd member of the attacking ranks at Barcelona could make his way to La Liga rivals Real Betis on loan before the month is out. That’s according to Diario…

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief provides fresh Dani Olmo & Pau Víctor update
arts.sum: Barcelona vice president Elena Fort has on Wednesday provided a fresh update on the club’s push to register Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor. The respective names of summer signings Olmo…

arts.ttl: Indonesia hires former Barcelona star Patrick Kluivert as head coach
arts.sum: Under Shin, Indonesia climbed into third place in the six-team Group C in the third round of qualification for the 2026 World Cup with six points, just one point behind Australia in second. “PSSI has officially appointed Patrick Kluivert as the new coach of the Indonesian National Team,” PSSI said in a statement.

arts.ttl: ‘I will renew my contract’ – Barcelona wonderkid Lamine Yamal commits his future to the club
arts.sum: Few rises in football have been as meteoric as that of Lamine Yamal. Since bursting onto the scene last season, and announcing himself to the world at the Euros, the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Club have 'not yet finalised' pre-contract agreement with German international
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly still waiting on a decision from Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah over a potential free transfer next summer.

arts.ttl: ‘Barcelona won’t be on top form’ – Real Betis director licking his lips at Copa del Rey clash
arts.sum: The draw for the last 16 of the Copa del Rey was made on Wednesday afternoon, and with it came the news that Real Betis would be making the long…

arts.ttl: Frenkie de Jong gets clear warning from Barcelona: ‘Either extend contract or go’
arts.sum: Among a number of players, Frenkie de Jong has been handed an ultimatum as Barcelona look to get bodies out the door (SPORT/VP).
